description: Whimsical, wing-borne fey flitting between worlds, bending magic as naturally as breathing.
subraces: Bright-hearted servants of the Summer Court, rewarding kindness and punishing rudeness.
Shadow-touched agents of the Winter Court delighting in cruel bargains and dark humor.
Political operatives navigating fey aristocracy with charm, glamour, and veiled threats.
Untamed wanderers following no court and obeying only their own chaotic impulses.
